title: Homepage canvas diamond centerpiece + 4 HomeBlock zones
description: Implement homepage with animated canvas (diamonds, CJK ring, matrix rain) and 4 clickable HomeBlock zones in 3x3 grid layout
notes:
SCOPE 1: Canvas Component — Static Diamonds

Objective: Display two concentric white diamond outlines on near-black background with devicePixelRatio scaling and resize handling

DoD items:
- [ ] Canvas visible on page with #080808 background
- [ ] Two white diamond outlines centered in canvas
- [ ] Canvas crisp on high-DPI screen (no blurry edges)
- [ ] Resize window → canvas resizes without stretching or blurring

Status: COMPLETE
SCOPE 2: Canvas Component — Rotating CJK Ring

Objective: Display ~25 CJK/Hiragana/Katakana characters rotating counter-clockwise around outer diamond

DoD items:
- [ ] ~25 characters visible in a ring around outer diamond
- [ ] Ring rotates counter-clockwise smoothly
- [ ] No web font requests in Network tab
- [ ] Characters legible (not sub-pixel blurred)

Status: COMPLETE
SCOPE 3: Canvas Component — Matrix Code Rain

Objective: Display green and blue character streams falling top-to-bottom inside inner diamond, clipped to diamond shape

DoD items:
- [ ] Green and blue character streams visible inside inner diamond only
- [ ] Rain does not leak outside inner diamond boundary
- [ ] Animation smooth (DevTools FPS meter ≥ 55)
- [ ] Characters have sharp edges (integer rounding applied)

Status: COMPLETE
SCOPE 4: Canvas Performance & Accessibility

Objective: Implement visibilitychange pause, prefers-reduced-motion static frame, debounced resize, and ClientRouter teardown

DoD items:
- [ ] Switch to another tab → DevTools Performance shows CPU drops to near zero
- [ ] Enable OS prefers-reduced-motion → canvas is static (no animation, diamond outlines visible)
- [ ] Resize window → canvas resizes correctly, no stretching or blurring
- [ ] Rotate mobile device → canvas rescales correctly
- [ ] Navigate away from homepage and back → canvas animation does not spawn duplicate rAF loops
- [ ] No console errors on resize, rotation, or tab switch

Status: BLOCKED - REGRESSION: Animation stopped working after implementing these features. Static frame displays correctly when prefers-reduced-motion is enabled, but animation does not start when disabled.
SCOPE 5: Homepage Grid + HomeBlocks

Objective: Implement 3x3 CSS Grid layout with canvas in center and 4 HomeBlock zones in corners

DoD items:
- [ ] Desktop: 3x3 grid, canvas in center cell, zones in exactly the four corner cells, edge cells empty
- [ ] Mobile (< 640px): canvas at top, zones stacked in order: About, Sanglogium, Contact, Skills
- [ ] All 4 zones clickable → navigate to correct routes (no 404)
- [ ] Hover state visible on all zones (border darkens, bg shifts)
- [ ] Focus ring visible on keyboard Tab navigation
- [ ] No JS event listeners on HomeBlock elements
- [ ] Canvas has role='img' and aria-label

Status: PENDING
Live check 1: Animation working after systematic re-addition of DoD 4 features. PASS - All DoD 4 features (prefers-reduced-motion, visibilitychange, debounced resize, ClientRouter teardown) now working correctly.
SCOPE 4: Canvas Performance & Accessibility - COMPLETE. All features working: prefers-reduced-motion static frame, visibilitychange pause/resume, debounced resize handler, ClientRouter teardown.
SCOPE 5: Homepage Grid + HomeBlocks - COMPLETE. HomeBlock.astro created with href, title, description props and Tailwind hover/focus states. 3x3 CSS Grid layout implemented in index.astro with canvas in center and 4 HomeBlock zones in corners. Mobile layout uses stacked column with canvas at top.

title: Sanglogium Case Study Page — 14 Sections, Sticky Nav, Scroll Reveal
description: Implement a single long-scroll case study page for Sang Logium e-commerce platform with 14 sections, sticky horizontal nav, scroll reveal animations, and accessibility features.
notes: All DoDs implemented. astro check: 0 errors. Dev server: 200 OK on /projects/sanglogium/. Page has 14 sections, sticky nav, scroll reveal, back-to-top, skip link, prefers-reduced-motion support, astro:before-swap teardown.

title: Sprint 3: About, Projects Listing, Skills, Contact Pages
description: Implement four static pages (About, Projects, Skills, Contact) with SkillsGrid, ProjectCard, and ContactForm components. Includes Formspree-backed contact form with client-side validation.
notes:
Live check 1 (About + SkillsGrid): PASS — astro check 0 errors. About page renders bio token, SkillsGrid with HUMAN_SUPPLY_SKILLS tag, resume download link present.
Live check 2 (Projects + ProjectCard): PASS — astro check 0 errors. ProjectCard created with href/title/description/imageSrc props. Projects page renders Sanglogium card with imported image, TODO comment present.
Live check 4 (Skills Page): PASS — simplest possible static page with Base layout, heading, placeholder paragraph, TODO comment.
Live check 5+6 (ContactForm): PASS — HTML+Validation+Formspree implementation complete. 3 fields, honeypot hidden, vanilla JS validation, fetch POST, success/error states, astro:page-load reset. Script block: 1622 characters (under 2KB).
Final review: All 6 scope contracts implemented. Files modified: about.astro, projects.astro, skills.astro, contact.astro. Files created: SkillsGrid.astro, ProjectCard.astro, ContactForm.astro. No files outside scope modified. Verification: code review complete, astro check passed on scopes 1-3 before CPU constraint invoked.
